connect.instancestorageconfig.encryption.Description: The full ARN of the encryption key.   Be sure to provide the full ARN of the encryption key, not just the ID.  Amazon Connect supports only KMS keys with the default key spec of [https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/asymmetric-key-specs.html#key-spec-symmetric-default](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/asymmetric-key-specs.html#key-spec-symmetric-default).
